title: Empresite Spain Business Directory Scraper
description: Scrapes empresite.eleconomista.es by keyword, rotating through all 52 Spanish provinces to maximize results (up to 1,200 per province × 52 = 62,400 results).

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Business activity/keyword to search (e.g., INSTALACIONES, RESTAURANTES, CONSTRUCCIONES)

maxPagesPerProvince.title: Max Pages per Province
maxPagesPerProvince.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape per province (max 40, each page has 30 results)

provincias.title: Provinces (optional filter)
provincias.description: List of province codes to scrape. Leave empty for all 52 provinces. Example: ["MADRID", "BARCELONA", "VALENCIA"]

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel browser pages. Keep low (2-5) to avoid rate limiting.

delayBetweenRequests.title: Delay between requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequests.description: Milliseconds to wait between each request. Higher = slower but safer.

captchaApiKey.title: 2Captcha API Key
captchaApiKey.description: API key for 2captcha.com CAPTCHA solving service. Required to bypass reCAPTCHA. Get one at https://2captcha.com

captchaMaxRetries.title: CAPTCHA max retries
captchaMaxRetries.description: Max times to retry solving a CAPTCHA on the same page before skipping

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape company detail pages
scrapeDetails.description: Visit each company profile page to extract phone, email and website. Much slower (1 extra request per company) but required for contact data and filters.

enableCityFallback.title: City-level fallback for large provinces
enableCityFallback.description: When a province has more than 1,200 results, automatically try to split by city to capture more companies.

requireWeb.title: Only save companies with website
requireWeb.description: Filter: only save companies where a website was found. Requires scrapeDetails=true.

requirePhone.title: Only save companies with phone
requirePhone.description: Filter: only save companies where a phone number was found. Requires scrapeDetails=true.

requireEmail.title: Only save companies with email
requireEmail.description: Filter: only save companies where an email was found. Requires scrapeDetails=true.

maxIdleSecs.title: Max idle seconds (watchdog)
maxIdleSecs.description: If no page is processed for this many seconds, the actor exits gracefully with whatever data it collected. Set to 0 to disable. Combine with an unlimited run timeout in Apify (Run options → Timeout = 0) to never cut off a working run.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential proxies recommended.
